mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_record (record_date, process_id, output_value, unit, input_user_id) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{processId}, #{outputValue}, #{unit}, #{inputUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT pr.*, p.process_name, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM production_record pr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON pr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.input_user_id = u.id WHERE pr.id = #{id}

SELECT pr.*, p.process_name, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM production_record pr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON pr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.input_user_id = u.id ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC

SELECT pr.*, p.process_name, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM production_record pr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON pr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.input_user_id = u.id WHERE pr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY pr.record_date DESC

SELECT pr.*, p.process_name, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM production_record pr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON pr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON pr.input_user_id = u.id WHERE pr.process_id = #{processId} ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC
